name: seo-toolkit
description: SEO optimization tools — auto-generate meta titles, descriptions, and Open Graph tags for your content entries
author: ServerlessKit Community
features: Auto-generate meta title from entry title field
Auto-generate meta description from content field
Open Graph tags for social media sharing
SEO score indicator for each entry

settings.label: Site URL
settings.description: Your website URL used for canonical URLs and Open Graph tags

settings.label: Default Meta Title Suffix
settings.description: Appended to all auto-generated meta titles

settings.label: Max Description Length
settings.description: Maximum characters for auto-generated meta descriptions

settings.label: Enable Open Graph Tags
settings.description: Generate og:title, og:description, og:image for social sharing
